update.name: System - JS Optimize
update.description:
System - JS Optimize Plugin. Minifies and defers JavaScript loading for Joomla 4/5/6 sites. Improves Core Web Vitals and PageSpeed Insights scores. Lightweight, no third-party dependencies. Compatible with Gantry, Cassiopeia and Helix Ultimate templates.
SHA-Bundle: 553246736447566b58312f36475a7761342f373962384b4f4d536368444c345862667145656c4137686957416d69624f77454547323363477a712b657947375239794f3462356d39584d5243494530546677435666413d3d
